gap_notes: No verified source repository has been promoted as official because the discovered repository identifies a different Rich Kids of TAO subnet identity.

Diffed the 99-path GreenCompute Gateway OpenAPI schema for undiscovered public GET endpoints -- the schema declares no security on everything, but nearly all of it (platform/users, platform/secrets, platform/admin/*, platform/billing/admin/*, platform/v1/debug/*, builds/workloads/deployments management, etc.) is actually 401-gated in practice. Only /readyz and /_metrics were genuinely public and added as new surfaces.

name: Green Compute
notes: Reviewed overlay for SN110. The official Green Compute website advertises a public model directory and API host; the discovered Rich Kids of TAO repository is retained only as registry-observed evidence pending identity review. Root->128 accuracy audit re-review pass (#5903): fixed 2 missing probe blocks; diffed the 99-path OpenAPI schema and added 2 new surfaces (readyz, Prometheus metrics) after live-testing every no-param candidate -- most declare no security but are actually 401-gated in practice.

surfaces.name: Green Compute website
surfaces.notes: Official Green Compute website for SN110.

surfaces.name: Green Compute model directory
surfaces.notes: Official model directory linked from the Green Compute website.

surfaces.name: Green Compute chat completions API
surfaces.notes: Official API endpoint advertised by the Green Compute website. The endpoint is POST-only, so recurring read probes are intentionally disabled until a safe health or schema endpoint is confirmed.
surfaces.rate_limit_notes: Auth and request-shape details need maintainer review before monitoring or proxy eligibility.

surfaces.name: Green Compute Gateway OpenAPI schema
surfaces.notes: Machine-readable OpenAPI 3.1 schema served publicly by the Green Compute API gateway (api.green-compute.com). Captured for schema-shape metadata only; endpoints are not invoked and no response payloads are persisted.

surfaces.name: Green Compute source repository candidate
surfaces.notes: Discovered source repository candidate from Tensorplex. The repository README identifies Rich Kids of TAO, so it remains registry-observed pending maintainer review.

surfaces.name: Green Compute Taopedia article
surfaces.notes: Discovered from the public Taopedia article repository. Not protocol authority.

surfaces.name: Green Compute Tensorplex subnet docs
surfaces.notes: Discovered from Tensorplex subnet-docs. Useful as documentation enrichment, not verified operational authority.

surfaces.name: Green Compute TaoMarketCap dashboard
surfaces.notes: Universal TaoMarketCap subnet dashboard candidate. Third-party enrichment, not protocol authority.

surfaces.name: Green Compute gateway healthz
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /healthz on api.green-compute.com returning gateway liveness JSON (observed: {"status":"ok","service":"greencompute-gateway"}). Documented as GET /healthz in the subnet OpenAPI spec on the same host as the existing chat-completions and openapi surfaces.

surfaces.name: Green Compute billing bonus rates API
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET returning platform billing bonus rates by payment method (stripe, usdt, usdc, tao, alpha). Documented in the subnet's own OpenAPI (api.green-compute.com/openapi.json, path /platform/billing/bonus-rates); same host as the existing healthz and openapi surfaces.

surfaces.name: Green Compute gateway readiness
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /readyz on api.green-compute.com returning gateway readiness JSON including database connectivity (observed: {"status":"ok","service":"greencompute-gateway","database":"ok"}). Documented in the subnet's own OpenAPI schema; distinct from the existing /healthz liveness surface.

surfaces.name: Green Compute gateway Prometheus metrics
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /_metrics on api.green-compute.com returning Prometheus-format gateway metrics (service info, auth-failure counters, and other operational gauges/counters). Documented in the subnet's own OpenAPI schema.
